code: import{useEffect,useRef}from'react';export default function useReveal(){let delay=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0;const ref=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{const el=ref.current;if(!el)return;const obs=new IntersectionObserver(_ref=>{let[entry]=_ref;if(entry.isIntersecting)el.classList.add('in');},{threshold:0.07});obs.observe(el);return()=>obs.disconnect();},[]);return ref;}
